Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22104 0 0}{f 5 21 1 523}You're in Class 2-E, right? Guess you're stuck with Ekoda for homeroom. Haha, that sucks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14426 0 0}{f 5 21 1 223}Stop laughing! Ugh, there's a bunch of gloomy weirdos in that class, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 223}Man, I hope something interesting happens. Something thrilling.[n]{f 1 1}
